description: inverted isLoggedIn$ from session-presence truthy check to inverse auth.service/auth.guard/admin.guard focused frontend unit scope
status: Initially survived because isLoggedIn$ had no direct assertion; killed after adding a focused isLoggedIn$ test in auth.service.spec.ts

description: changed promo API failure normalization from null to 10
notes: Existing promo.api.spec.ts already asserted that promo API failure must normalize to null

mutation_type: failure handling changed to success-like behavior
description: changed checkout order failure toast from error path to success toast
notes: Existing checkout.page.spec.ts already asserted that order creation failure must show an error toast

description: changed missing order status normalization from NEW to DELIVERED
notes: Existing orders.api.spec.ts already asserted that missing status must normalize to NEW

description: inverted admin role check so non-admin users pass and admins fail
notes: Existing admin.guard.spec.ts already asserted both allow-admin and block-non-admin behavior

description: weakened empty-cart guard so checkout could proceed with an empty cart
notes: Existing checkout.page.spec.ts already asserted that empty-cart checkout must be blocked and orders.create() must not be called

description: removed cart reset when authenticated user becomes null so previous user cart can remain in memory
notes: Existing cart.store.integration.spec.ts already asserted that cart must clear on logout and user isolation must hold
